validated_commands.test: python3 -m uv run pytest tests/unit tests/test_console.py -x -q
validated_commands.test_full: python3 -m uv run pytest tests/unit tests/test_console.py -x -q
validated_commands.format: python3 -m uv run black . && python3 -m uv run isort .
validated_commands.notes: uv is not on PATH in CI; use 'pip install uv --break-system-packages' then 'python3 -m uv'. Lockfile is apm.lock.yaml (not apm.lock). Legacy apm.lock still supported via migration. ScriptRunner is lazily imported inside functions in run.py - patch 'apm_cli.core.script_runner.ScriptRunner' not 'apm_cli.commands.run.ScriptRunner'. Avoid --cov flag: causes PyYAML global state corruption.

coverage_baseline.notes: All 3028 tests pass as of 2026-03-26 on main branch.

yaml_pollution_note: Running tests with --cov causes PyYAML global state corruption from some earlier test. Tests pass without --cov.
ansi_strip_note: 7 ANSI failures fully resolved as of 2026-03-16. No longer a concern.
config_bug_note: set_auto_integrate/get_auto_integrate were missing from apm_cli/config.py - fixed in PR 2026-03-19.
lockfile_format_note: Lockfile is apm.lock.yaml (LOCKFILE_NAME constant). Legacy apm.lock read via get_lockfile_path fallback. Tests should write apm.lock.yaml.

testing_backlog.notes: 3 tests for 167 lines. Missing: dev version, check mode, already latest, fetch failure, ImportError, update failure, exception handling.
379 lines, some mcp tests exist but unclear coverage of this specific command file.
Large complex file. High-value but needs scoped approach.

completed_work.description: Task1: validated 3028 tests pass on main. Task2: identified update.py and mcp.py as next coverage targets. Deferred new PR due to 11 open TI PRs already pending review.
Task3: 20 new tests for run and preview commands (14%->83%). 2677 total tests passing.
Task3: 20 new tests for prune command (14%->91%). 2613 total tests passing.
Task3: 29 new tests for constitution_block (53%->93%) and injector (44%->95%). 2290 total tests passing.
Task4: all 7 open TI PRs have passing CI. Task3: fixed gc.collect+sleep teardown pattern in 5 test files (closes #185). 2261 tests passing.
